customer_messages.body:
Dear Northwind Strategic team,

We have identified several areas requiring immediate attention for your account. Our teams are actively engaged to resolve the following concerns:

• Regulatory hold: An open regulatory hold of type "data-residency" requires legal review.
• Overdue invoice: Overdue invoice of $41,000 requires immediate resolution.
• Delayed shipment: A shipment is past its committed delivery date and requires follow-up.
• Escalated support: An open high-severity support case requires urgent attention.
• Usage decline: Usage has declined 38% period-over-period, indicating possible churn risk.

A dedicated recovery team has been assigned and will be in contact within 24 hours to coordinate next steps. We appreciate your partnership and are committed to resolving these issues promptly.

Best regards,
Customer Success

audit_events.description: Account escalation initiated. 5 signals: Regulatory hold, Overdue invoice, Delayed shipment, Escalated support, Usage decline. Owners assigned: Legal, Finance, Customer Success, Support.

owner_tasks.title: Customer Success — Strategic account recovery review

workflow_state.status: At-risk escalation active with executive recovery owner routing and customer-visible audit history.
workflow_state.risk_summary: 5 signals: Regulatory hold, Overdue invoice, Delayed shipment, Escalated support, Usage decline
